changeSet.author: asavin
changeSet.sql:
create or replace view config.config as WITH robots_properties AS ( SELECT ((((('robots.'::text || (robots.access_tool)::text) || '.'::text) || (robots.name)::text) || '.'::text) || (robot_props.key)::text) AS key, robot_props.value, robots_configurations.configuration_id FROM (((config.robots robots JOIN config.robots_properties robot_props ON ((robots.id = robot_props.robot_id))) JOIN config.robots_configurations ON ((robots.id = robots_configurations.robot_id))) JOIN config.configurations ON (((robots_configurations.configuration_id = configurations.id) AND ((configurations.application)::text = 'executor'::text)))) UNION SELECT ((((('robots.'::text || (robots.access_tool)::text) || '.'::text) || (robots.name)::text) || '.'::text) || (robot_props.key)::text) AS key, robot_props.value, robots_configurations.configuration_id FROM (((config.robots robots JOIN config.robots_properties robot_props ON ((robots.id = robot_props.robot_id))) JOIN config.robots_configurations ON ((robots.id = robots_configurations.robot_id))) JOIN config.configurations ON (((robots_configurations.configuration_id = configurations.id) AND ((configurations.application)::text = 'analyzer'::text)))) UNION SELECT ('access-tools.'::text || (robots.name)::text) AS key, robots.access_tool AS value, robots_configurations.configuration_id FROM ((config.robots robots JOIN config.robots_configurations ON ((robots.id = robots_configurations.robot_id))) JOIN config.configurations ON (((robots_configurations.configuration_id = configurations.id) AND ((configurations.application)::text = 'ppm'::text)))) UNION SELECT ((('processing-times.'::text || (robots.name)::text) || '.'::text) || times.check_method) AS key, (times.processing_time)::text AS value, robots_configurations.configuration_id FROM (((config.robots robots JOIN config.robots_configurations ON ((robots.id = robots_configurations.robot_id))) JOIN config.configurations ON (((robots_configurations.configuration_id = configurations.id) AND ((configurations.application)::text = 'ppm'::text)))) JOIN config.processing_times times ON ((robots.id = times.robot_id)))
UNION SELECT ((('robots-sla.'::text || LOWER(sla.sla_type) || '.'::text || (robots.name)::text) || '.'::text) || LOWER(sla.sla_period)) AS key, (sla.check_unit_value)::text AS value, robots_configurations.configuration_id FROM config.robots robots JOIN config.robots_configurations ON (robots.id = robots_configurations.robot_id) JOIN config.configurations ON (robots_configurations.configuration_id = configurations.id AND configurations.application::text = 'ppm'::text) JOIN config.robots_sla sla ON robots.id = sla.robot_id UNION SELECT (('robots-traffic.'::text || (robots.name)::text)) AS key, (times.traffic_per_check_unit)::text AS value, robots_configurations.configuration_id FROM config.robots robots JOIN config.robots_configurations ON (robots.id = robots_configurations.robot_id) JOIN config.configurations ON (robots_configurations.configuration_id = configurations.id AND configurations.application::text = 'ppm'::text) JOIN config.processing_times times ON robots.id = times.robot_id ) SELECT conf.application, conf.profile, conf.label, g_props.key, g_props.value FROM (config.configurations conf JOIN config.global_properties g_props ON ((conf.id = g_props.configuration_id))) UNION SELECT conf.application, conf.profile, conf.label, robots_properties.key, robots_properties.value FROM (config.configurations conf JOIN robots_properties ON ((conf.id = robots_properties.configuration_id)));
changeSet.rollback:
create or replace view config.config as WITH robots_properties AS ( SELECT ((((('robots.'::text || (robots.access_tool)::text) || '.'::text) || (robots.name)::text) || '.'::text) || (robot_props.key)::text) AS key, robot_props.value, robots_configurations.configuration_id FROM (((config.robots robots JOIN config.robots_properties robot_props ON ((robots.id = robot_props.robot_id))) JOIN config.robots_configurations ON ((robots.id = robots_configurations.robot_id))) JOIN config.configurations ON (((robots_configurations.configuration_id = configurations.id) AND ((configurations.application)::text = 'executor'::text)))) UNION SELECT ('access-tools.'::text || (robots.name)::text) AS key, robots.access_tool AS value, robots_configurations.configuration_id FROM ((config.robots robots JOIN config.robots_configurations ON ((robots.id = robots_configurations.robot_id))) JOIN config.configurations ON (((robots_configurations.configuration_id = configurations.id) AND ((configurations.application)::text = 'ppm'::text)))) UNION SELECT ((('processing-times.'::text || (robots.name)::text) || '.'::text) || times.check_method) AS key, (times.processing_time)::text AS value, robots_configurations.configuration_id FROM (((config.robots robots JOIN config.robots_configurations ON ((robots.id = robots_configurations.robot_id))) JOIN config.configurations ON (((robots_configurations.configuration_id = configurations.id) AND ((configurations.application)::text = 'ppm'::text)))) JOIN config.processing_times times ON ((robots.id = times.robot_id)))
UNION SELECT ((('robots-sla.'::text || LOWER(sla.sla_type) || '.'::text || (robots.name)::text) || '.'::text) || LOWER(sla.sla_period)) AS key, (sla.check_unit_value)::text AS value, robots_configurations.configuration_id FROM config.robots robots JOIN config.robots_configurations ON (robots.id = robots_configurations.robot_id) JOIN config.configurations ON (robots_configurations.configuration_id = configurations.id AND configurations.application::text = 'ppm'::text) JOIN config.robots_sla sla ON robots.id = sla.robot_id UNION SELECT (('robots-traffic.'::text || (robots.name)::text)) AS key, (times.traffic_per_check_unit)::text AS value, robots_configurations.configuration_id FROM config.robots robots JOIN config.robots_configurations ON (robots.id = robots_configurations.robot_id) JOIN config.configurations ON (robots_configurations.configuration_id = configurations.id AND configurations.application::text = 'ppm'::text) JOIN config.processing_times times ON robots.id = times.robot_id ) SELECT conf.application, conf.profile, conf.label, g_props.key, g_props.value FROM (config.configurations conf JOIN config.global_properties g_props ON ((conf.id = g_props.configuration_id))) UNION SELECT conf.application, conf.profile, conf.label, robots_properties.key, robots_properties.value FROM (config.configurations conf JOIN robots_properties ON ((conf.id = robots_properties.configuration_id)));
